title: Proxy Pattern
subtitle: Control access to a real object through the same interface

panels.heading: Virtual Proxy
bullets: Create real object on first use

panels.heading: Protection Proxy
bullets: Keeps auth out of business code

panels.heading: Caching Proxy
bullets: Delegate on miss, return cache on hit

footer: Proxy = access control. Decorator = behavior enhancement. Both keep the same interface but serve different purposes.
